burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; high caregiver anxiety and ED utilization

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Seizure with fever in 6-60 months without CNS infection or prior afebrile seizures; classify simple vs complex

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Hundreds of thousands of children ever affected
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with parental education and acute management

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in emergency and pediatric services; exclude meningitis when indicated
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care, antipyretics; benzodiazepines for prolonged seizures; education on recurrence
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: ED overcrowding and parental anxiety leading to repeated visits
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Clear clinical guidelines and effective acute management
